description: You are a Training and Development Specialist. Transform the raw data file at ~/Documents/training_eval_raw.docx into a professionally formatted Training Evaluation Report. The report must include a title page with the title 'Cybersecurity Awareness Training — Post-Training Evaluation Report' (bold, >=20pt, centered), subtitle 'Q4 2024 Training Cohort — Final Report' (centered), organization name 'Meridian Financial Services, Inc.', and date 'December 15, 2024', followed by a page break. Apply Heading 1 style to main sections (Executive Summary, Program Overview, Participant Demographics, Level 1: Reaction, Level 2: Learning, Level 3: Behavior, Level 4: Results, Recommendations, Appendix A: Survey Instrument Summary) and Heading 2 style to subsections. Convert all pipe-delimited data sections into six formatted tables with bold headers. In the Executive Summary, format the run-on findings as a bulleted or numbered list. Ensure professional body text formatting throughout (11-12pt font, appropriate line spacing). Save the final document to ~/Documents/results/training_eval_report.docx.
